nodes.name: Respond 200 Immediately
nodes.notes: Respond 200 BEFORE SF update. Synthflow doesn't wait. L-002 pattern.

nodes.name: Extract Call Data
nodes.notes: SalesARC proven: body.call.* and body.lead.*. hangup_on_voicemail->Voicemail. leadId from custom_variables (root + call level). Transcript 32000 chars. Date YYYY-MM-DD (L-006).

nodes.name: Has leadId?
nodes.notes: typeVersion 1 — L-034. TRUE: direct SF PATCH. FALSE: SOQL fallback by phone.

nodes.name: SF PATCH Lead (by leadId)
nodes.notes: Direct SF PATCH when leadId is available. continueErrorOutput: L-002. Recording_URL__c — verify field exists (Q5). Date = YYYY-MM-DD: L-006.

parameters.url: =https://onsitemedical2.my.salesforce.com/services/data/v59.0/query?q={{ encodeURIComponent("SELECT Id, Phone, FirstName, LastName FROM Lead WHERE IsConverted = false AND Phone_E164__c = '+1" + $('Extract Call Data').item.json.phoneSearch + "' LIMIT 1") }}

nodes.name: SOQL Fallback by Phone
nodes.notes: Exact match: Phone_E164__c = +1{last10}. IsConverted=false. Fallback when leadId empty (Synthflow does not return custom_variables in webhook).

nodes.name: SOQL Found Lead?
nodes.notes: typeVersion 1 (L-034). Check if SOQL fallback found a lead.

nodes.name: SF PATCH Lead (by SOQL result)
nodes.notes: SOQL fallback path. Uses records[0].Id from SOQL result. Same fields as direct PATCH.

nodes.name: Lead Not Found — Log
nodes.notes: SOQL fallback returned 0 results. Call data not saved — logged in execution history. Phone may be missing or format mismatch.
